prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ferrari Dino 246-derived **FERRARI F106C 2.4L V6** (engine code: *F106C*), stroked to 2.7L with a **JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs** (10.5:1 CR) and **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** for 350+ HP on **VP Racing Fuels MR6** (118 octane).

Forced induction via **Garrett GT35R turbo** (0.82 A/R, 67mm compressor) with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 46mm external bypass valve**, mated to a **DTA S80 ECU** with **Motec C125 dash** for real-time boost mapping (1.5 bar peak).

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers** (24-position rebound, 22-position compression) and **SPL Pro-R front/rear sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear), paired with **Brembo GT 380mm 6-pot calipers** (AP Racing pads) and **Ferodo DS3000 brake compound**.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-Stratos widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, extended rockers) with **custom 3M Matte Olive Green wrap** and **Rally Art Stratos-spec rear wing** (aluminum, 3mm thickness).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (Schroth 6-point harnesses) and **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede), paired with **Defi BF gauges** (oil temp, boost, fuel pressure) mounted on a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**.

Lightweight **Dymag carbon fiber wheels** (15x9 front, 15x11 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires** (225/40R15 front, 285/35R15 rear) with **H&R wheel spacers** (20mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive stance.
